notes: range_contains treats the second empty/nonempty range as contained when both bounds fit inside the first range
empty range is contained by every valid range descriptor
range_contains_element uses numeric comparison when bounds and element are numeric
narrow flat JSON range descriptors are accepted and preserve inclusive upper bounds
range_lower returns the normalized textual lower bound
range_lower returns SQL NULL for an empty range descriptor
range_lower_inc returns true only for a present inclusive lower bound
range_overlaps treats shared inclusive boundary as overlap
malformed bracket descriptors refuse with exact invalid-input diagnostic
touching ranges are strictly left when the shared boundary is excluded by at least one side
range_strictly_right is the symmetric strictly-left route
range_upper returns the normalized textual upper bound
range_upper_inc returns false for an exclusive present upper bound
range_upper_inc propagates SQL NULL input as SQL NULL boolean
